9781684972746.name: Terror Man Manhwa Volume 4
9781684972746.description: Terror Man Manhwa Volume 4 features story by Dongwoo Han and art by JinHo Ko. Jungwoo is becoming ever more entangled in the fallout of Project Imagine. When he encounters another member of the project, another super-powered human who was supposedly sent by Jungwoo’s father, he inches ever closer to the truth and towards the inevitable conclusion of chaotic mission. However, Lilia is growing worried. Has Jungwoo’s determination and supposed destiny changed him irreparably for the worse?

9798888435816.series: Orb: On the Movements of the Earth
9798888435816.name: Orb: On the Movements of the Earth Manga Omnibus Volume 3
9798888435816.description: Orb: On the Movements of the Earth Manga Omnibus Volume 3 collects volumes 5-6 in an oversized edition and features story and art by Uoto.To fulfill Badeni’s plan, Oczy heads for a fateful duel with Inquisitor Nowak. Gras. Oczy. Badeni. Jolenta. Piast. All have put their lives on the line in pursuit of truth. What will be revealed? Hope or despair?Twenty-five years later, amidst upheavals that threaten the authority of C--ity, a girl loses her father to the fate that God decreed and loses her own faith while taking action toward what she truly believes. What destiny awaits her?

9781638587668.name: Reincarnated as a Dragon Hatchling Novel Volume 7
9781638587668.description: Reincarnated as a Dragon Hatchling Novel Volume 7 was written by Necoco with illustrations by Naji Yanagida.As Illusia continues his quest, he finds himself on a strange new island at the end of the world. But this isn’t just any island—it’s full of A-rank and even L-rank monsters no one has ever seen before! What’s more, the ruins are covered in English and hiragana, characters from the old world. His curiosity piqued, Illusia ventures deeper into the ruins, determined to uncover its secrets…and stumbles upon the legendary dragon king Diabolos. But does Illusia’s “Dragon King’s Son” skill mean that Diabolos is his dad?!

9798891603059.name: Tokyo Revengers: A Letter from Keisuke Baji Manga Volume 1

9798400901157.name: Unholy Blood Manhwa Volume 3
9798400901157.description: Unholy Blood Manhwa Volume 3 features story and art by Lina Lim.It’s time for Hayan’s second fight against an Angel of Death! But Sahan’s hypnosis powers make him a much more formidable opponent than Luci—one wrong move, and Hayan will put the lives of innocent students at risk. And with Sahan leveraging the memories of Father Michael’s death against her, even Hayan’s pureblood prowess might not be enough to stop him…

9798888772065.name: The Seven Deadly Sins: Four Knights of the Apocalypse Manga Volume 13
9798888772065.description: The Seven Deadly Sins: Four Knights of the Apocalypse manga volume 13 features story and art by Nakaba Suzuki.Percival has always lived with his grandfather on the idyllic, remote God's Finger. And though Percival loves the simple life, he longs for adventure. That is, until adventure comes knocking at his door, tearing away everything he's ever known and leaving him alone in the world. Now Percival has no choice but to go out into the world and see what it holds… after all, it's his destiny in this latest volume!

9798400901829.name: The Villainess Turns the Hourglass Manhwa Volume 4

9781984862723.series: My Love Story with Yamada-kun at Lv999
9781984862723.name: My Love Story with Yamada-kun at Lv999 Manga Volume 4

9781962201209.name: Momo: Legendary Warrior Manga Volume 3
9781962201209.description: Momo: Legendary Warrior Manga Volume 3 features story by Haruna Nakazato and Naoto Tsujima, and art by Z-ONE, based on the original manga by Kazuto Okina.Momo and Taro's adventure comes to an end! After having crashed on the dangerous planet Bizarrearth, their journey led them to face bloodthirsty oni, animal-ish tribes and even other humans! What awaits them at the end of their journey? What'll be the fate of these star-crossed lovers? This new world could end before it even has a chance to begin!FINAL VOLUME!

9798888770450.name: Go! Go! Loser Ranger! Manga Volume 11

9781646518739.name: Ogami-san Can't Keep It In Manga Volume 6
9781646518739.description: Ogami-san Can't Keep It In manga volume 6 features story and art by Yu Yoshidamaru.Ogami-san has been keeping a dirty little secret from her peers at school: Puberty has emptied her mind of everything but perverted fantasies! For the sake of leading an ordinary school life, she pulls out all the stops to keep her mental wild side under wraps. But when she literally reaches a hand out to Yaginuma-kun, a cute but mysterious boy in her class, her innermost thoughts just come spilling out! What's a girl to do in this latest volume?!

9798888770856.name: The Blue Wolves of Mibu Manga Volume 3
9798888770856.description: The Blue Wolves of Mibu manga volume 3 features story and art by Tsuyoshi Yasuda.Danger seems to lurk around every corner in Kyoto, and a cabal of well-hidden imperial loyalists is slaying the Shogun's supporters from the Aizu Clan. When the daimyo of Aizu contracts the Mibu Roshigumi to investigate and bring the killers to justice, it seems like the perfect opportunity for the cash-strapped group to find a powerful patron who will bring them under his wing. But how will they find an enemy hidden in plain sight, and what will the trio of boys from Kyoto--Nio, Hajime and Taro--be able to do against grown hit men?

9781975393830.name: Your Forma Novel Volume 6
9781975393830.description: Your Forma: Electronic Investigator Echika and the Dark Alliance Novel Volume 6 was written by Mareho Kikuishi with illustrations by Tsubata Nozaki.Echika is on suspension after Brain Diving without a warrant. But when suspected members of the Alliance start getting killed one after another, Echika is quickly reinstated as an investigator in order to get down to the bottom of things…

9798888771846.series: Gazing at the Star Next Door
9798888771846.name: Gazing at the Star Next Door Manga Volume 3
9798888771846.description: Gazing at the Star Next Door magna volume 3 features story and art by Ammitsu.Chiaki is a pretty normal teenage girl. Since they were kids, she's had a thing for her best friend Subaru--who's fast becoming the hottest young actor in Japan! With Subaru threatening to slip away, Chiaki has a decision to make in this latest volume.

9798891606111.name: The Strange House Manga Volume 1
9798891606111.description: The Strange House Manga Volume 1 features story by Uketsu (Asukashinshakan) and art by Kyo Ayano.I’ve always had a fascination with the occult; you might even call it my specialty. I’ve been brought in as a consultant on many supernatural and strange mysteries. But nothing could have prepared me for this house. It seemed so ordinary at first, except for that one room. It had no doors, no windows, and was tucked away, leaving anyone to think it was just a wall. I knew that there was something more to it. It shouldn’t be there, it shouldn’t exist, and yet…Just what is this house, and what dark secrets does it hold?

9781646518524.series: Saving 80,000 Gold in Another World for My Retirement
9781646518524.name: Saving 80,000 Gold in Another World for My Retirement Manga Volume 8

9798888772621.series: I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability
9798888772621.name: I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability Manga Volume 13
9798888772621.authors: Yosuke Kokuzawa - Kenkyo na Circle - Meru.
9798888772621.description: I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability manga volume 13 features story by Kenkyo na Circle and art by Yosuke Kokuzawa.Prince Lloyd wasn't always a prince…in a previous life, he was a sorcerer, of sorts. So when he was forced to reincarnate, he decided to continue his studies, prince of the realm or no! But his new life has its own sets of challenges…including being a 10-year-old! What's the 7th prince/sorcerer to do in this latest volume?!

9781975367947.name: Sabikui Bisco Novel Volume 8
9781975367947.description: Sabikui Bisco Novel Volume 8 is written by Shinji Cobkubo with illustrations by K Akagishi and mocha.Bisco and Milo are out searching for Ghost Hail mushrooms for a pregnant Pawoo when an airborne ark appears and abducts them in an attempt to “save” the creatures of Earth. But just when things start looking desperate, Milo miraculously gives birth! The mysterious mushroom child Sugar Akaboshi wastes no time in freeding them. But there are many other creatures who’ve been “saved” on the ark. If our heroes want to free them, they'll have to awaken Sugar's true powers…

9798400900679.name: THE STAR SEEKERS Manhwa Volume 4
9798400900679.description: THE STAR SEEKERS Manhwa Volume 4 features story and art by HYBE with TOMORROW X TOGETHER.While all Star One want to do is perform for their fans and use their magical powers for good, they find themselves in the crossfires of a larger conflict! On one side is the Dragon Slayer Clan, a masked group that seem to take every chance to attack them. On the other side is the Dragon Sect, who seem friendly enough, but their motivations remain a mystery. When Viken discovers some uncomfortable truths about both sides, Star One finds themselves at a crossroads that may determine the fate of the world…

9781975392864.name: Let This Grieving Soul Retire Manga Volume 8
9781975392864.description: Let This Grieving Soul Retire: Woe Is the Weakling Who Leads the Strongest Party Manga Volume 8 features story by Tsukikage and art by Rai Hebino and Chyko.“BIG DEAL. I’M A DRAGON SLAYER TOO.”“All their blood, sweat, and tears…They’ve spilled a bit more than the rest of you.”  Anticipation is boiling in the capital of Zebrudia as word spreads about the arrival of the Crashing Lightning, a Dragon Slayer from the Land of Fog. However, Krai only cares about the upcoming auction and recharging his depleted relics. Meanwhile, in order to strengthen the party’s magic, Sitri has her eye on a particular target…

9781647293055.series: Don't Toy With Me, Miss Nagatoro
9781647293055.name: Don't Toy With Me, Miss Nagatoro Manga Volume 17

9798888771242.series: Turns Out My Online Friend is My Real-Life Boss!
9798888771242.name: Turns Out My Online Friend is My Real-Life Boss! Manga Volume 2
9798888771242.description: Turns Out My Online Friend is My Real-Life Boss! manga volume 2 features story and art by Nmura.It’s been three months since the absolutely ordinary and plain office worker, Hashimoto, started going out with his boss, Shirase, and they’re reaching their first-month anniversary of moving in together. After the miracle discovery that “his online friend turned out to be his real-life boss,” Hashimoto and Shirase had quite the tumultuous start. But after a bunch of misunderstandings, the two are finally together…yet, their days are far from romantic when all they do are play video games and eat together! Getting worried, Hashimoto decides to try leveling up their relationship! But what do you do when your boyfriend’s successful, older, and super hot…?!

9781975394103.series: The Magical Girl and the Evil Lieutenant Used to Be Archenemies
9781975394103.name: The Magical Girl and the Evil Lieutenant Used to Be Archenemies Manga
9781975394103.description: The Magical Girl and the Evil Lieutenant Used to Be Archenemies Manga features story and art by Cocoa Fujiwara.She’s a magical girl, sworn to fight for peace, love, and justice. He’s a lieutenant, born into a military family that serves an evil empire. And yet, it was love at first sight… From Inu × Boku SS creator Cocoa Fujiwara comes a four-panel comic about hostile enemies who won’t kill (and love) each other!

9798888438718.name: Classroom of the Elite: Year 2 Novel Volume 9
9798888438718.description: Classroom of the Elite: Year 2 Novel Volume 9 was written by Syougo Kinugasa with illustrations by Tomoseshunsaku and is a continuation of the original story.The final special exam of the semester is on the horizon: a cooperative written test where students answer problems in turn. Horikita’s class is up against Sakayanagi’s, and everyone rushes to prepare. As this goes on, Nagumo poses a question of his own—who will be the next student council president? The candidates are Horikita and Ichinose…or are they? Does Ichinose have other plans? December may be the end of the year, but the school’s new state of chaos is only beginning.

9781975398279.name: Magical Girl Raising Project Novel Volume 18
9781975398279.description: Magical Girl Raising Project Novel Volume 18 is written by Asari Endou with illustrations by Marui-No.Frederica, Old Blue, and Principal Halna clash over a powerful relic stored deep within the ruins hidden underneath the old school building. A murderous intruder picks off students one after another. Surrounded by enemies at every turn, Snow White stands before the entrance to the ruins that hold the fate of the world and makes a critical decision… At last, Snow White’s long saga comes to a close! How will the story of this girl at the mercy of destiny end…?

9798888772577.name: Pass the Monster Meat, Milady! Manga Volume 5
9798888772577.description: Pass the Monster Meat, Milady! manga volume 5 features story by Chika Mizube with art by Peperon.Like any proper noble lady, one must have certain acquired tastes. For Melphiera Marchalrayd, she just happens to crave a rather exotic protein - monsters! But do not judge! Despite its bad reputation, monster meat can be used in exquisite cuisine and Melphiera is determined to change the kingdom's opinion of it! Unfortunately, since debuting in society, Melphiera has been struggling to find her perfect match…until she meets the fearless “Blood-Mad Duke” of Galbraith! Get cooking with this latest volume!

9798888772898.name: Pupposites Attract Manga Volume 1
9798888772898.description: Pupposites Attract manga volume 1 features story and art by Hono Natsuna.Chiharu's bold personality in a petite frame strikes a contrast in every way to her scaredy-cat Rottweiler Tsubu-chan--and the same could be said for the sturdy but shy Kiyotaka and his outgoing Pomeranian, Monjuro. Yet, for these inseparable pairs, their long walks together are the highlights of the day. One encounter leads to another, and before long, these two unusual duos find their feelings changing…

9798891602502.name: Might as Well Cheat: I Got Transported to Another World Where I Can Live My Wildest Dreams! Manga Volume 8
9798891602502.description: Might as Well Cheat: I Got Transported to Another World Where I Can Live My Wildest Dreams! Manga Volume 8 features story by Munmun and art by Butcha-U.Tauro’s brush with death while working for the Knight Corps had unintended consequences, such as reducing the Knight Corps’s numbers. Recruitment begins at the operator school, which gives Tauro’s former classmates—including Ponytail—a shot at joining the ranks. Meanwhile, Tauro’s busy training up his magic, and the empire sends assassins to Jehanne for unknown purposes. With the kingdom in upheaval, Tauro’s got more work cut out for him before he can take a well-deserved break!

9781646519538.series: The Iceblade Sorcerer Shall Rule the World
9781646519538.name: The Iceblade Sorcerer Shall Rule the World Manga Volume 10
9781646519538.description: The Iceblade Sorcerer Shall Rule the World manga volume 10 features story by Nana Mikoshiba and art by Norihito Sasaki.A commoner from the countryside, Ray White finds himself surrounded by the children of aristocrats at Arnold Academy of Magic. But hey, wait! How did a seemingly talentless commoner like Ray get into Arnold Academy in the first place…? More discoveries await in this latest volume!

9781974748860.name: Naruto: Sasuke's Story - The Uchiha and the Heavenly Stardust Manga Volume 2

9798888772232.series: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
9798888772232.name: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Manga Omnibus Volume 3
9798888772232.description: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime manga omnibus volume 3 contains volumes 7-9 and features story by Fuse with illustrations by Taiki Kawakami. Mikami's middle age hasn't gone as he planned: He never found a girlfriend, he got stuck in a dead-end job, and he was abruptly stabbed to death in the street at 37. So when he wakes up in a new world straight out of a fantasy RPG, he's disappointed but not exactly surprised to find that he's facing down a dragon, not as a knight or a wizard but as a blind slime demon. But there are chances for even a slime to become a hero, and maybe even build a country where the rejects and outcasts can find a place to belong…

9798891600393.name: Crossplay Love: Otaku x Punk Manga Volume 9
9798891600393.description: Crossplay Love: Otaku × Punk Manga Volume 9 features story and art by Toru.When Hanayama gets his hands on some erroneous information, he mistakenly assumes that Yuuma is a close friend of Shuumei's and kidnaps him to exact his revenge! It's not like Yuuma means anything to Shuumei, so what will Shuumei do when he finds out?! When a case of mistaken identity goes this wrong, surely something else is bound to slip!

9798891602748.series: She's the Strongest Bride, But I'm Stronger in Night Battles
9798891602748.name: She's the Strongest Bride, But I'm Stronger in Night Battles Manga Volume 1

9798891608504.name: Guardian Special Edition Novel Volume 3
9798891608504.description: Guardian: Zhen Hun Special Edition Novel Volume 3 was written by Priest with illustrations by Marmaladica and includes a set of 6 postcards, a double-sided bookmark, 2 folded mini posters, plus a sticker sheet. The novel is printed in large trim with deluxe paper, french flaps, spot gloss covers, a mix of exclusive color and b/w interior illustrations, and a robust glossary and name guide specific to the series.When a mysterious illness knocks Zhao Yunlan off his feet, he enjoys being doted on by Shen Wei—until he discovers a grim secret that threatens to tear them apart. However, it’s not just their domestic bliss that’s on the verge of collapse. The Great Seal is cracking, order itself is about to break down and extinguish all life, and their only hope to stop the destruction is the final Hallowed Artifact: the Soul-Guarding Lamp. But even as the world threatens to crumble around them, Zhao Yunlan searches for the truth and a way to keep Shen Wei by his side, this time for all eternity. The thrilling conclusion to the hit series arrives!FINAL VOLUME

9781638585480.name: Yokohama Kaidashi Kikou Manga Omnibus Volume 5

9798891602908.name: The Lady and Her Butler Manhwa Volume 1 (Color)
9798891602908.description: The Lady and Her Butler Manhwa Volume 1 features story and art by Jade.Lim Sooha is an independent woman who has it all: a busy career, a brand-new home, and an ever-growing pile of household chores. And the last thing she needs is a man to mess things up. But that all changes when one walks through her front door–literally! Homeless and desperate for a break, Taesoo begs Sooha to let him stay in exchange for keeping house. Tempted by the idea of coming home to a warm meal, clean sheets, and ironed clothes, Sooha agrees after Taesoo shows just how capable he really is…and claims to be gay.Could this be the perfect arrangement, or will Taesoo’s lie and Sooha’s conflicted feelings make a bigger mess?

9798888771396.series: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
9798888771396.name: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity Manga Volume 2
9798888771396.description: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity manga volume 2 features story and art by Saka Mikami.Chidori High is a boys' school that takes in the dregs of society with the lowest grades. Next door stands Kikyo Girls' High, where the wealthy, high-class families send their precious daughters. Chidori second-year Rintaro, who has a fierce face but a gentle heart, is helping at his family's patisserie when he meets a girl named Kaoruko. The two hit it off right away…but this blissful peace is quickly disturbed when Rintaro discovers that Kaoruko is actually a student at Kikyo. Worse, she doesn't seem to realize what a huge problem this really is! Will these two be able to forge a path for themselves in this latest volume, and sidestep the traps (metaphorical and literal) laid by their classmates?

9798400901713.name: A Business Proposal Manhwa Volume 6
9798400901713.description: A Business Proposal Manhwa Volume 6 features story by Haehwa and art by NARAK.Hari and Taemu have finally taken the “fake” out of “fake dating,” and their very real romance is in full bloom! In a classic office relationship moment, Hari finds chocolates and flowers on her desk…except they’re not from Taemu? Who could be her secret admirer? And what will her real boyfriend do when he finds out?

9781974721696.name: Fist of the North Star Manga Volume 14 (Hardcover)

9781975389130.series: The Misfit of Demon King Academy
9781975389130.name: The Misfit of Demon King Academy: Act 1 Novel Volume 4
9781975389130.description: The Misfit of Demon King Academy: Act 1 Novel Volume 4 was written by SHU with illustrations by Shizumayoshinori.The war between demon and man has been successfully thwarted, marking the students’ return to the Demon King Academy. If only peace were so easy to obtain. The people of Dilhade must now face the truth about the long-awaited Demon King and adjust to the abolishment of royalty. Anos must tread carefully–for old enemies, and even old friends, have been awaiting his return. A familiar face from two thousand years ago then arrives at the Demon King Academy—but he’s somehow been possessed by a god! Nosgalia the Heavenly Father, who opposed Anos during the Mythical Age, swears to impose his downfall and return order to the world. But can order truly fight the foe that abolishes all reason? Find out in the fourth installment of The Misfit of Demon King Academy: the Great Spirit Arc!

9781974748686.name: #DRCL midnight children Manga Volume 3 (Hardcover)
9781974748686.description: #DRCL midnight children manga volume 3 features story and art by Shin'ichi Sakamoto.With Lucy’s life hanging in the balance, tempers flare and tensions rise as Arthur, Quincey, Joe, and Mina struggle to decide who is best suited to offer aid to their precious friend. However, the sudden appearance of Count Dracula may render all their efforts for naught. Will Professor Van Helsing’s vaunted knowledge be able to hold back the count’s advance, or will the collected wisdom of humanity falter in the overwhelming presence of the undead king?

9781975378936.series: The Tiger Won't Eat the Dragon Yet
9781975378936.name: The Tiger Won't Eat the Dragon Yet Manga Volume 2
9781975378936.description: The Tiger Won't Eat the Dragon Yet Manga Volume 2 features story and art by Hachi Inaba.In the mountains somewhere, a young dragon was captured by a beautiful female tiger. The two, once prey and predator, set out on a journey after forming a mysterious bond. Dragons live for a thousand years, but tigers only live for fewer than twenty. Can the animal pair find a way to overcome their differing lifespans and stay together for longer?

9781975380328.name: The Hachioji Specialty: Tengu's Love Manga Volume 1
9781975380328.description: The Hachioji Specialty: Tengu's Love Manga Volume 1 features story and art by Tomo Nanao.Upon his return to his hometown near Mt. Takao, the lonely youth Kotarou reunites with a tengu girl he used to know, Hime. To his shock, Hime decrees that they must be wed! Intent on marrying Kotarou, will Hime be able to break through his walls and build a happily-ever-after with him?!

9798888438688.name: World's End Harem: Fantasia Manga Volume 12
9798888438688.description: World's End Harem: Fantasia Manga Volume 12 features story by LINK and art by SAVAN.With the fall of house Isteshia, the Reptile War has come to an end. Arc now controls the eastern part of the continent. With his marriage to Kaimaya, he plans to unify the four Isteshia branch families, and decides to recreate the Ancient Kingdom of Fafnir as well. Retta, meanwhile, plans to crash Arc’s coronation ceremony and get a good look at the man who appears to be entwining himself with the empire. What will happen during the meeting between two of the most powerful men in the continent?

9798400901928.series: The Perks of Being an S-Class Heroine
9798400901928.name: The Perks of Being an S-Class Heroine Manhwa Volume 2
9798400901928.description: The Perks of Being an S-Class Heroine Manhwa Volume 2 features story by Irinbi and art by Grrr.Having survived her first dungeon, Ailette is on a roll! Not only has she found a way to use the dungeon’s inhabitants to make money, but she’s also now able to unlock allies’ potential with cash. Most exciting of all, she gets the opportunity to finally meet the hero of Infinite Returns to Save the World—but nothing in this world can be easy, and she falls into an S-rank dungeon with the protagonist! Will she be able to keep the protagonist alive and change the fate of the 17th loop for good?

9781974748839.name: Love's in Sight! Manga Volume 8
9781974748839.description: Love's in Sight! manga volume 8 features story and art by Uoyama.FINAL VOLUME!To fulfill his promise, Morio takes Yukiko on an exciting seaside drive for her very first trip to the beach. There, she learns about the beautiful and terrifying wonders of the ocean. Then, Morio finally meets Yukiko’s dad—who’s convinced that his little girl shouldn’t be dating a delinquent! What kinds of troubles and adventures await Morio and Yukiko in this final volume?

9781975365127.series: The Illustrated Guide to Monster Girls
9781975365127.name: The Illustrated Guide to Monster Girls Manga Volume 4
9781975365127.description: The Illustrated Guide to Monster Girls Manga Volume 4 features story and art by Suzu Akeko.The monster girls fought, went at each other’s throat, got kidnapped, sabotaged one another, killed and were killed. But it’s now time to part ways and graduate…except they’re still first-years?!

9798891600386.series: The Aristocrat's Otherworldly Adventure: Serving Gods Who Go Too Far
9798891600386.name: Chronicles of an Aristocrat Reborn in Another World Manga Volume 10
9798891600386.description: Chronicles of an Aristocrat Reborn in Another World Manga Volume 10 features story by Yashu and art by Nini.During her visit to the royal capital, the Holy Woman Hinata narrowly escapes an attempt on her life. Cain, who saved her with his magic, launches a counterattack to find and capture those who were behind the assassination plot. Will he crush this evil that lurks in the dark?

9781974748846.name: Mao Manga Volume 18
9781974748846.description: Mao manga volume 18 features story and art by Rumiko Takahashi.Nanoka and Mao attempt to mediate a deadly dispute between curse-wielding sisters Kagari and Ayame. Then, our exorcist heroes are off to investigate a village whose residents are rumored to perform human sacrifices to a mysterious water god. Is Nanoka’s sword Akanemaru up to the task that lies ahead…?

9798888437445.name: The Most Notorious Talker Runs the World's Greatest Clan Manga Volume 7
9798888437445.description: The Most Notorious “Talker” Runs the World's Greatest Clan Manga Volume 7 features story by Jaki with art by Yamorichan.Blue Beyond and the Winged Knights clash in a test where the victors gain the right to establish their own clan, and the losers will be forced to disband forever! So why is it that Blue Beyond shows no signs of even wanting to compete? While Noel and his crew shrug their shoulders, the Winged Knights hunt down the the fearsome Dantalion, but the monster's ability to read its prey's thoughts makes it impossible to slay! With Leon and the Winged Knights in a panic, Noel oh-so-casually plays the ace up his sleeve, and Blue Beyond leisurely heads into battle… What is that cold-hearted handsome devil up to and how can even the world's greatest strategist outthink a creature that knows his very thoughts?!

9781974748792.name: Insomniacs After School Manga Volume 7
9781974748792.description: Insomniacs After School manga volume 7 features story and art by Makoto Ojiro.After disobeying Magari’s parents, Nakami and Magari face a strict separation. Magari is banned from having any contact with Nakami beyond school. Overwhelmed with guilt, the duo reluctantly agrees to put their connection on hold. At the same time, the astronomy club faces disbandment, and the pair must make a bold move in an attempt to save it. Can Nakami and Magari defy the odds to salvage both their relationship and the future of the astronomy club?

9781974748891.name: Tokyo These Days Manga Volume 3 (Hardcover)
9781974748891.description: Tokyo These Days manga volume 3 features story and art by Taiyo Matsumoto.Believing in the future of manga while never forgetting its past, Shiozawa accompanies manga creators once again through their agony to create an ultimate manga project. Is there ever joy in creation?

9798888770160.name: Sketchy Manga Volume 3
9798888770160.description: Sketchy manga volume 3 features story and art by MAKIHIROCHI.Ako's get-together with friends from high school comes to an uncomfortable end when Asuka, a former member of their group, announces on television that she was bullied in school. Looking back on one of her last conversations with Asuka, Ako wonders if her life truly means anything…

9798888770627.name: Quality Assurance in Another World Manga Volume 9
9798888770627.description: Quality Assurance in Another World manga volume 9 features story and art by Masamichi Sato.After meeting back up with Nikola and retrieving his debugger stone, Haga is once again swept into major trouble when a god-versus-god main quest activates! The final battle against the Entermation Inc. AI employees finally begins!

9798888771082.name: Wistoria: Wand and Sword Manga Volume 8
9798888771082.description: Wistoria: Wand and Sword manga volume 8 features story by Fujino Omori, the creator of Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon?, and art by Toshi Aoi.Thanks to the last-minute awakening of Will’s mageblade, Regarden emerges bloodied but unbroken after the attack on the Terminalia. Yet victory is bittersweet, for Rosti made the ultimate sacrifice, and Will lacks enough credits to advance to the Tower. Only a miracle could keep his dream alive now as graduation day approaches…

9798888770566.series: My Lovesick Life as a '90s Otaku
9798888770566.name: My Lovesick Life as a '90s Otaku Manga Volume 4
9798888770566.description: My Lovesick Life as a '90s Otaku manga volume 4 features story and art by Nico Nicholson.Otaku culture has finally become mainstream, and Megumi can't quite get used to it. Divorced, with a teen daughter, Megumi thinks fondly back to her days as an anime and manga otaku--in 1995. That year, she transferred to a new school and decided to start fresh by hiding her otaku interests. She found herself taken under the wing of a basketball ace named Masamune, who's got a kind heart and looks just like one of her favorite characters. Though Megumi catches a whiff of destiny in the air, she's crushed to learn that Masamune detests otaku… What will become of their relationship in this latest volume?

9781975398828.series: The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat
9781975398828.name: The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat Manga Volume 6
9781975398828.description: The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat Manga Volume 6 features story by Rui Tsukiyo and art by Reia and Hamao Sumeragi.Lugh challenges the orc general leading the monster horde, but no matter how he kills the demon, a mysterious force negates the damage. Tagging out with Epona, the hero unleashes the full fury of her overwhelming S-rank skill—“Berserk!” The full power of the hero is revealed at last, but what ramifications will the battle have on the war against the demons—and on Lugh’s true mission?

9781974748853.name: Mashle: Magic and Muscles Manga Volume 17
9781974748853.description: Mashle: Magic and Muscles manga volume 17 features story and art by Hajime Komoto.Innocent Zero’s youngest child, Domina, steps in to put a stop to his father’s pursuit of Mash. Using the reprieve afforded them, Mash’s friends race against the clock in hopes of getting him to Meliadoul, the only hope he has of surviving without a heart. Meanwhile, as Mash hovers between life and death, he encounters a mysterious figure.

9781974748778.name: Fool Night Manga Volume 2
9781974748778.description: Fool Night Manga Volume 2 features story and art by Kasumi Yasuda.Struggling in poverty and slowly transforming, Toshiro must figure out how to spend the two brief years of humanity he has left after undergoing the transfloration procedure. The vine growing from his stomach has made him question his relationship with his mother and his employment at Transflora Medical. Meanwhile, Hourai assists in the investigation of a string of murders committed by a spiriflor.

9781974748693.name: Animal Crossing: New Horizons - Deserted Island Diary Manga Volume 7
9781974748693.description: Animal Crossing: New Horizons: Deserted Island Diary manga volume 7 features story and art by KOKONASU RUMBA.There are even more vacation homes to design for Paradise Planning clients! Can the gang create the perfect studio for Hazel, who’s hoping to make it as a manga artist?!

9781974748822.name: Like a Butterfly Manga Volume 8
9781974748822.description: Like a Butterfly manga volume 8 features story and art by suu Morishita.Suiren and Kawasumi are now second-years, and they’re fortunate enough to be in the same class! Seeing each other this way is nice, but Suiren starts to feel lonely as Kawasumi immerses himself in karate. Can Suiren work up the courage to tell Kawasumi that she wants more?

9781974748785.name: Helck Manga Volume 11
9781974748785.description: Helck manga volume 11 features story and art by Nanaki Nanao.At long last, the identity of the Human King comes to light! In order to finally acquire the pieces he needs to enact his goals, the king tries to take control of Helck’s body. Instead, Helck releases his hidden power and faces off against the Human King at the start of this final battle!

9781975380045.series: She Likes Gays, but Not Me
9781975380045.name: She Likes Gays, but Not Me Manga Volume 2

9781974748815.name: Let's Do It Already! Manga Volume 2
9781974748815.description: Let's Do It Already! Manga Volume 2 features story and art by Aki Kusaka.After Yuri begins dating Keiichiro Katsuragi, she begins to discover what it’s like spending time with a member of the elite. When they commute to high school, they’re chaperoned by his private guards, and there are surveillance cameras in his private chauffeured car. It’s difficult to be romantic, especially now that a handsome spy from the Katsuragi family is interfering in their relationship!

9781974748907.name: Wolf Girl and Black Prince Manga Volume 9

9781975390686.name: Sword Art Online Alternative Clover's Regret Novel Volume 1
9781975390686.description: Sword Art Online Alternative Clover's Regret Novel Volume 1 was written by Reki Kawahara and Soitiro Watase.Asuka Empire. A Japanese-style VRMMO created by Akihiko Kayaba from a VR engine entitled “The Seed.” A game, once played by Yuuki, Ran, and Merida of the Sleeping Knights, that hides many stories… Two young women—warrior priestess Nayuta, and ninja Koyomi, who met and became friends in-game—come across a mysterious priest named Yanagi. The elderly man tells them that he’s looking for a detective to solve a riddle, and that the reward for this quest will be one million yen. Shocked by the outlandish sum of this peculiar request, the two girls come across an equally peculiar young man, who claims to be able to do the job as well as any other detective. With all his stat points invested in Luck, the man is useless in battle, but he does still seem to have some tricks up his sleeve, like that unbeatable drop rate for rare items… The mystery unfolds as two young girls and their dubious detective partner try to solve the case in this cutting-edge VRMMO world!

9781974748754.name: Dark Gathering Manga Volume 9
9781974748754.description: Dark Gathering manga volume 9 features story and art by Kenichi Kondo.Yayoi and her friends have been trapped in a deadly game of dream tag by a sinister spirit wearing the body of an elementary schooler! With only a single spirit at her disposal, will Yayoi be able to help everyone escape from the deranged teacher that’s hunting them, or will they all end up as nothing but food for the crows?

9781975398620.name: The Summer Hikaru Died Manga Volume 4
9781975398620.description: The Summer Hikaru Died Manga Volume 4 features story and art by Mokumokuren.Two boys grew up together in a certain village—Yoshiki and Hikaru. One day, Yoshiki became sure that Hikaru was no longer himself. He resolved to accept the new “Hikaru,” whatever happened to his friend. But now he’s decided to research the history of “Nounuki-sama” and Kubitachi to understand what this creature truly is. The situation evolves unpredictably, outside the boys’ control. Who will make the next move, and what will they find?

9781975391607.series: Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai
9781975391607.name: Rascal Does Not Dream of Santa Claus Novel

9781974745630.name: My Hero Academia: Team-Up Missions Manga Volume 5
9781974745630.description: My Hero Academia: Team-Up Missions manga volume 5 features story and art by Yoko Akiyama.Like always, the students take on crazy challenges on the path to full-fledged herodom. Deku and Bakugo battle desert island demons that traumatized even the powerful All Might! The lessons don’t stop there, as these hero hopefuls learn discipline through cleaning the school and the power of cuteness by playing the part of an idol!

9781975392789.name: Bungo Stray Dogs Dazai Chuuya Age Fifteen Manga Volume 2
9781975392789.description: Bungo Stray Dogs: Dazai, Chuuya, Age Fifteen Manga Volume 2 features story by Kafka Asagiri and art by Shiwasu Hoshikawa.At the behest of Mori, the Port Mafia boss, Dazai and Chuuya launch their investigation into the rumors of the previous boss’s revival, as well as the mysterious “Arahabaki” that’s somehow involved. Randou, one of the Mafia’s sub-executives, is said to have witnessed the supposed god, but where will his information lead the two?

9781975374747.series: So What's Wrong with Getting Reborn as a Goblin?
9781975374747.name: So What's Wrong with Getting Reborn as a Goblin? Manga Volume 6
9781975374747.description: So What's Wrong with Getting Reborn as a Goblin? Manga Volume 6 features story by Nazuna Miki and art by Tsukasa Araki.These days, Akira’s goblin village is starting to look more like a multicultural metropolis—they’ve got a human ambassador, elves, a demon girl, a real dragon… But peace and good times never last long! So when Akira is away from the village and a scaled shadow sweeps in, it brings mayhem with it! The whole village can’t put up a fight against their vicious visitor—will even Akira be able to bring her to heel!?

9781975392512.name: Re:ZERO Starting Life in Another World Short Story Collection Novel Volume 1

9781975393403.series: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon?
9781975393403.name: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon? Novel Volume 19
9781975393403.description: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon? Novel Volume 19 is written by Fujino Omori with illustrations by Suzuhito Yasuda.As the Labyrinth City hurriedly cleans up the aftermath of the Freya Familia war game, ship returns to port. The School District is an enormous mobile institution dedicated to education and supported by the Guild. By chance, Bell infiltrates the academic district and happens upon a half-elf who greatly resembles someone he knows very well…

9781974745739.series: Zom 100 Bucket List of the Dead
9781974745739.name: Zom 100: Bucket List of the Dead Manga Volume 15
9781974745739.description: Zom 100: Bucket List of the Dead manga volume 15 features story by Haro Aso and art by Kotaro Takata.After realizing that “Meet the woman of my dreams” has been crossed off the bucket list, Shizuka suddenly remembers Akira’s reaction when she was bitten by a zombie. The two go into such a panic that even the Nagasaki dolphins avoid them, sensing how awkward their relationship has become. Adding fuel to the fire, the handsome Dr. Sakaki, who’s made it his quest to save those troubled by the zombies, enters their lives and sees something special in Shizuka.

9781974746255.name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu Academy Manga Volume 3

9781975371395.series: Banished From the Hero's Party I Decided to Live a Quiet Life in the Countryside
9781975371395.name: Rejected by the Hero's Party, a Princess Decided to Live a Quiet Life in the Countryside Manga Volume 1

9781646092420.series: The Ice Guy and His Cool Female Colleague
9781646092420.name: The Ice Guy and the Cool Girl Manga Volume 6
9781646092420.description: The Ice Guy and the Cool Girl manga volume 6 features story and art by Miyuki Tonogaya.While Himuro is the ice-prone descendant of a snow spirit living in modern times and his coworker Fuyutsuki’s poker face always makes her seem cool and aloof, both of them secretly wrestle with feelings they aren’t sure how to handle—for each other! When Himuro invites Fuyutsuki over to his house for the first time, they watch a horror film that just so happens to star his younger sister, Yukimi. The combination of having his crush in his house and the suspense of the horror movie is a recipe for a heart-pounding evening!

9781975390228.series: Monthly in the Garden with my Landlord
9781975390228.name: Monthly in the Garden with My Landlord Manga Volume 3

9781647292591.name: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun Manga Volume 9
9781647292591.description: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun manga volume 9 features story and art by Osamu Nishi.Iruma Suzuki has always been eager to please, even at the cost of his well-being. Worst yet, he's the son of two selfish parents who end up selling him to a demon. Now he’s attending school as the grandson of an older demon and Iruma’s having to figure out how to blend in with his demonic classmates or risk getting eaten. All he needs to do is subjugate rival classmates, summon familiars, and do other typical demon things while never revealing that he's human… it’s a piece of cake in this latest volume, right?

9781975379827.series: Riviere and the Land of Prayer
9781975379827.name: Riviere and the Land of Prayer Manga Volume 1
9781975379827.description: Riviere and the Land of Prayer Manga Volume 1 features story by Jougi Shiraishi and art by Azure and Neriume.After Riviere saved her from dying on the street, MacMillia chose to start working as her new assistant! The enigmatic Riviere runs an antique shop, where she specializes in dispelling troublesome (and sometimes dangerous) curses. Magic, witches, prayers (and the curses they turn into) mean there’s never a dull day for these two!

9781975391133.name: My Youth Romantic Comedy Is Wrong, As I Expected Manga Volume 22

9781975389468.name: My First Love's Kiss Novel Volume 1

9781975391201.series: I Kept Pressing the 100-Million-Year Button and Came Out on Top
9781975391201.name: I Kept Pressing the 100-Million-Year Button and Came Out on Top Manga Volume 6

9781975389055.series: The Ephemeral Scenes of Setsuna's Journey
9781975389055.name: The Ephemeral Scenes of Setsuna's Journey Novel Volume 4

9781975389697.series: The Do-Over Damsel Conquers the Dragon Emperor
9781975389697.name: The Do-Over Damsel Conquers the Dragon Emperor Manga Volume 4
9781975389697.description: The Do-Over Damsel Conquers the Dragon Emperor Manga Volume 4 features story by Sarasa Nagase and art by Anko Yuzu and Mitsuya Fuji.Time has turned back six years, and Jill, the daughter of a noble, is doing her life over. Jill heads to the Ravean Empire’s capital with Hadis and the others, but on the way, they are attacked by the imperial army that revolted against the emperor! In order to investigate why they were driven out of the capital and protect Hadis from harm, Jill disguises herself and takes the exam to join the imperial Dragon Knights!

9781975391652.series: The Dark History of the Reincarnated Villainess
9781975391652.name: The Dark History of the Reincarnated Villainess Short Story Collection Manga

9781975391348.name: Sentenced to Be a Hero Novel Volume 3
9781975391348.description: Sentenced to Be a Hero Novel Volume 3 was written by Rocket Shokai with art by MEPHISTO.The Second Capital has fallen to the Demon Blight, and it’s up to the combined forces of the Noble Alliance, the Ninth Order of the Holy Knights, and Penal Hero Unit 9004 to retake it. But first, they must establish a base on snowy Mount Tujin, facing legions of faeries along the way. And once again, the heroes take the most dangerous role—serving as decoys! Meanwhile, as things on the battlefield take a grim turn, a pair of refugees stumble through the freezing wilderness, holding an important key to winning the war ahead.

9781975375577.series: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
9781975375577.name: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Novel Volume 19

9781427877536.name: Dinner for Three Novel
9781427877536.description: Dinner for Three Novel was written by Hizaki Isamu with illustrations by Yukimura Kanae.Struggling to raise his young brother on his own, Shizuku has been working as a male companion in order to make ends meet. One day, he mistakenly thinks that his little brother has been kidnapped and attacks his neighbor, Tsujido. Seeing that the brothers need help, Tsujido starts to cook warm meals and care for them. For the first time, Shizuku got a taste of what it's like to be taken care of in a family…

9781974746385.name: The Way of the Househusband Manga Volume 12
9781974746385.description: The Way of the Househusband manga volume 12 features story and art by Kousuke Oono.Tatsu ends up on the radar of an overeager police officer when he attends a traffic safety class, and it isn’t long before a simple class demonstration turns deadly! Well, for the mascot dragged into it, anyway. Has the law finally caught up with this yakuza legend turned househusband, or will he get off clean once again?

9798888438558.series: My Cat is Such a Weirdo
9798888438558.name: My Cat is Such a Weirdo Manga Volume 4 (Color)
9798888438558.description: My Cat is Such a Weirdo Manga Volume 4 features story and art by Tamako Tamagoyama in full-color.Ton-chan has been growing more affectionate while Shino-san does things at her own pace as usual. Now a foster cat, Taneo, arrives. What happens when this new member joins the family will overload you with cuddles and cuteness!

9781974747023.name: Given Manga Volume 9
9781974747023.description: Given manga volume 9 features story and art by Natsuki Kizu.FINAL VOLUME!Mafuyu arrives in Shibuya where syh’s concert will be held. Clutching the tickets both Ritsuka and Hiragi have given him, Mafuyu stops dead in his tracks when he runs into someone who shouldn’t be in Tokyo—Ugetsu. What does his presence there mean, and could this be the catalyst Mafuyu needs to finally move forward and make a decision?

9798888435786.name: 365 Days to the Wedding Manga Volume 4
9798888435786.description: 365 Days to the Wedding Manga Volume 4 features story and art by Tamiki Wakaki.After a shock confession, things have never been so awkward between the fake couple. It was all meant to be a lie, after all! While Honjouji Rika struggles to answer him, Oohara Takuya finds himself wrapped up in his co-worker’s romantic struggles as well. It turns out relationships can be more complicated than he expected! Meanwhile, Rika’s trying to reckon with her own feelings about love and marriage. Will she be able to answer Takuya honestly?

9798888434598.name: Cat on the Hero's Lap Manga Volume 3
9798888434598.description: Cat on the Hero's Lap Manga Volume 3 features story by Kousuke Iijima and art by Shiori.The Demon King’s henchmen finally make an appearance! They might be fearsome opponents, but at least the hero has a cat by his side (and in his lap!). Plus, while the heroes are on their quest, they meet a little kitten!

9781975368531.name: Hell Mode Novel Volume 5
9781975368531.description: Hell Mode: The Hardcore Gamer Dominates in Another World with Garbage Balancing Novel Volume 5 was written by Hamuo and illustrated by Mo.After defeating a Demonic Deity and leading Rohzenheim to victory, the No-life Gamers now set their sights on the Rank S dungeon. Before they head to Baukis, though, Allen uses his new elven connections to arrange for the Gamers to graduate from the Academy early. Allen then brings the gang to Krena Village to drop in on his family and introduce everyone. What’s supposed to be a simple trip, however, quickly escalates into something more. It turns out that when Keel’s family had their House restored, their lands were also returned to them—including the nest of the white dragon that has terrorized the area for centuries! The group eventually makes their way to Baukis and reunites with Meruru with much pomp and circumstance. There, they stand together before the Tower of Tribulations, the Rank S dungeon that no one—not even Hero Helmios nor the champions of ages past—has ever cleared. Challenges and encounters galore await the No-life Gamers where all the world’s greatest fighters gather!

9798888439821.name: Yokai Cats Manga Volume 8 (Color)
9798888439821.description: Yokai Cats volume 8 features story and art by PANDANIA in full-color.Yokai cats--there are so many different types, it's hard to choose! Do amabie, kappa, nurikabe, or nekomata not seem like the right pets for you? Then meet our new friend Konaki-jiji, the crying old man yokai, who has thick eyebrows and gets heavier when he sleeps. Like the rest, he’s strange and lovable in his own way!

9781684973033.name: Centaurs Manga Volume 5
9781684973033.description: Centaurs Manga Volume 5 features story and art by Ryo Sumiyoshi.Long before Matsukaze was a mighty stallion, he was a young foal living and playing in the forested mountains of his homeland, learning the traditional ways of life from his family and from nature. While coexistence with their living environment is essential, a matter of mutual respect, coexistence with the encroachment of humankind is another thing altogether…

9798891602991.series: The Weakest Tamer Began a Journey to Pick Up Trash
9798891602991.name: The Weakest Tamer Began a Journey to Pick Up Trash Novel Volume 7
9798891602991.description: The Weakest Tamer Began a Journey to Pick Up Trash novel volume 7 was written by Honobonoru500 with illustrations by Nama.Winter has melted away, making way for the warm spring to arrive! Full of hope and anticipation, Druid and Ivy travel to the next village over to experience an exhilarating spring festival. This village is like nothing Ivy has ever seen before—even the gate protecting it is different! Ivy can’t wait to find out what this vibrant and colorful place has in store for her and her friends.

9798891602892.series: The Knight Captain is the New Princess-to-Be
9798891602892.name: The Knight Captain is the New Princess-to-Be Manga Volume 4
9798891602892.description: The Knight Captain is the New Princess-to-Be Manga Volume 4 features story and art by Yasuko Yamaru.Christina, a.k.a. “Lady Chris,” was born into a noble family and treated more or less like a boy growing up. Now a dashing young woman, Chris is not only captain of the imperial guards–she personally protects Prince Leonardo, who has been a dear friend since childhood. When his father, the king, demands he find a suitable girl to marry, Leo insists that he’s already found one: Chris! Chris is shocked, but figures that Leo doesn’t really love her like that; it’s probably just some ploy to keep the king happy. Chris decides to play along, but as the charade goes on, she starts to wonder if maybe her princely pal has actually fallen for her in this latest volume.

9781962201254.name: Kerberos In The Silver Rain Manga Volume 3
9781962201254.description: Kerberos In The Silver Rain Manga Volume 3 features story by Lira Aikawa (naked ape) and Nao Itsuki and art by Berry Star.This is a dog you can't put down!Goto and Leon, fed up with all the secrecy of Kerberos, decide to discover once and for all what the “psi” is by their own means… But they are not the only ones looking for answers! Their most lethal enemy to date, Griffin, is looking for the same thing, and it might be too much for the Hellhounds. Meanwhile, Sakuya must deal with a crisis on her own, and in the process come to terms with her own identity as Nayuta. It's the spectacular finale to this gripping story!

9798888770641.name: Shangri-La Frontier Manga Volume 13
9798888770641.description: Shangri-La Frontier manga volume 13 features story by Katarina and art by Ryosuke Fuji.High schooler Rakuro loves hunting down “trash games,” but one day he decides to play a AAA VR game called Shangri-La Frontier instead. He creates a character with a bird head, skips the cutscenes and jumps right in--but what awaits him in this game is different from anything he's ever faced in this latest volume…

9798400901898.name: The World After the Fall Manhwa Volume 7
9798400901898.authors: Undead Gamja(3B2S STUDIO) - singNsong - S-Cynan - Phil Christie
9798400901898.description: The World After the Fall Manhwa Volume 7 features story by singNsong and art by Undead Gamja.Jaehwan’s group is on the verge of achieving the centuries-long dream of all Chaos residents—taking back the life-giving Fruits! But the opponent is a Master said to be one of the strongest in the Great Realm. In order to seize the victory, Jaehwan must awaken the next stage of his powers!

9781975368340.series: My Instant Death Ability Is So Overpowered, No One in This Other World Stands a Chance Against Me!
9781975368340.name: My Instant Death Ability Is So Overpowered, No One in This Other World Stands a Chance Against Me! Novel Volume 5
9781975368340.description: My Instant Death Ability Is So Overpowered, No One in This Other World Stands a Chance Against Me! Novel Volume 5 was written by Tsuyoshi Fujitaka with illustrations by Chisato Naruse.Having overcome countless trials (without much difficulty), Yogiri and Tomochika finally managed to reunite with their classmates in the capital. But between the efforts of Ayaka, a synthetic classmate who swore revenge against her fellow students, the meddling of Sion, a Sage determined to cull the weak and produce a new superbeing from their class of candidates, and the revival of the Dark God Mana, the majority of the class — not to mention the entire capital — were ultimately wiped out. Somehow, amid the chaos, the unlikely pair were able to draw Sion out and acquire their first concrete clue about how to get home: they will need a number of Philosopher’s Stones, powerful artifacts carried within the bodies of the Sages. After taking one from Sion and finding another dropped into their laps by Risley, the only surviving clone of the Sage Lain, who they killed some time earlier, the two highschoolers set off in search of a third energy source, leaving a trail of ruins behind them.

9781975391942.series: The Hero Laughs While Walking the Path of Vengeance a Second Time
9781975391942.name: The Hero Laughs While Walking the Path of Vengeance a Second Time Novel Volume 7
9781975391942.description: The Hero Laughs While Walking the Path of Vengeance a Second Time Novel Volume 7 was written by Nero Kizuka and illustrations by Sinsora.After successfully returning to the other world, Kaito happens upon Leticia, but she doesn't seem to recognize him. Meanwhile, Kaito spends some time leveling up alongside his two newest accomplices, Mai and Yuuto. So when two targets of his vengeance show up—a prince of the beast lands named Leon, and Leticia's elder sister Lilia—the three of them are ready. It's time to show these traitors a taste of their own medicine.

9798888770931.name: Pass the Monster Meat, Milady! Manga Volume 4
9798888770931.description: Pass the Monster Meat, Milady! manga volume 4 features story by Chika Mizube with art by Peperon.Like any proper noble lady, one must have certain acquired tastes. For Melphiera Marchalrayd, she just happens to crave a rather exotic protein - monsters! But do not judge! Despite its bad reputation, monster meat can be used in exquisite cuisine and Melphiera is determined to change the kingdom's opinion of it! Unfortunately, since debuting in society, Melphiera has been struggling to find her perfect match…until she meets the fearless “Blood-Mad Duke” of Galbraith! Get cooking with this latest volume!

9781646517763.name: Am I Actually the Strongest? Manga Volume 7
9781646517763.description: Am I Actually the Strongest? manga volume 7 features story by Sai Sumimori and art by Ai Takahashi.To be reincarnated into another world with the promise of a “cheat” power is one thing. But to be reborn as a baby, and then left for dead after your royal parents think you're powerless? That's another thing entirely! Now the newly-born Reinhart-Hart to his new friends-must find his way through a dangerous world…but luckily he's got magic to call upon that's quite literally off the charts in this latest volume!

9781974748884.name: Sakamoto Days Manga Volume 13
9781974748884.description:
Sakamoto Days Manga Volume 13 features story and art by Yuto Suzuki.
In order to avoid expulsion from the JCC, a young Sakamoto, Nagumo, and Akao are assigned a special mission—along with another outcast, Uzuki. Their target to assassinate is located at a special department store for hit men, but unbeknownst to them, their actions there will alter the course of their futures forever…

9781975350420.name: High School DxD Novel Volume 14
9781975350420.description: High School DxD Novel Volume 14 was written by Ichiei Ishibumi and features illustrations by Miyama-Zero.Issei’s many triumphs have finally won him the adulation he’s always hoped for, although not with the crowd he would’ve liked. Rather than legions of adoring ladies, he’s got tons of mages clamoring to make a pact with him! Well, so long as he finds a cute mage girl, it’ll all be worth it, right? Meanwhile, Gasper receives an order from his vampire family to return home. Why would they want him back after neglecting him for so long?

9781646092994.name: Daemons of the Shadow Realm Manga Volume 5
9781646092994.description: Daemons of the Shadow Realm manga volume 5 features story and art by Hiormu Arakawa, the creator of Fullmetal Alchemist. After a fierce scuffle against Long-Arm and Long-Leg, Yuru meets their timid master, Ken—who happens to be Dera’s half brother! Ken reveals that his father had helped Yuru’s parents go into hiding, prompting Dera to contact a shady shaman for more intel on the previous Tadera clan head. Meanwhile, another tragedy is about to befall Higashi Village, courtesy of a swordsman named Ivan Yosano…

9781974748914.name: Yona of the Dawn Manga Volume 42
9781974748914.description: Yona of the Dawn manga volume 42 features story and art by Mizuho Kusanagi.Yona and her friends have thwarted South Kai’s Emperor Chagol, but Sinha, Jaeha, and Zeno are still nowhere to be found. Suddenly, Yona hears the voice of a dragon! But the biggest surprise might be what Su-won reveals to Hak regarding his plans for succession…

9798855401998.name: Bungo Stray Dogs Manga Volume 24
9798855401998.description: Bungo Stray Dogs Manga Volume 24 features story by Kafka Asagiri and art by Sango Harukawa.Together with their partners, Dazai and Dostoyevsky engage in a deadly battle of minds as they blitz through the security of Meursault. Sigma seeks to steal the secrets of Dostoyevsky’s skill, but such a prize will not come without its price. Meanwhile, Atsushi agonizes over what he’s learned, only to be forced once again to fight against Akutagawa—now a vampire. With the struggle for One Order coming to a head, who will come out on top?!

9781975391560.name: My Happy Marriage Novel Volume 7
9781975391560.description: My Happy Marriage Novel Volume 7 is written by Akumi Agitogi with illustrations by Tsukiho Tsukioka.After stopping the Gifted Communion, Miyo and Kiyoka can finally wed. But the day before they are to be formally married, Kiyoka is called away to deal with an emergency, and as the ceremony fast approaches, he is nowhere to be found. Dressed in her wedding clothes, Miyo waits patiently for her future husband.

9781974748761.series: Tonikawa: Over the Moon for You
9781974748761.name: Fly Me to the Moon Manga Volume 25
9781974748761.description: Fly Me to the Moon manga volume 25 features story and art by Kenjiro Hata.Nasa and Tsukasa finally uncover the truth behind Tsukasa’s curse, and it’s…complicated. So complicated that the newlyweds need some serious couple time to process things. Unfortunately, Nasa finds hacking advanced alien technology way easier than thinking up a good date spot to take his wife. And little do Nasa and Tsukasa know that they’re about to cross paths with another couple—one whose history with our heroes will make things more complicated than ever!

9781975374266.series: Witch Life in a Micro Room
9781975374266.name: Witch Life in a Micro Room Manga Volume 3
9781975374266.description: Witch Life in a Micro Room Manga Volume 3 features story and art by Akitaka.In a shocking development, it turns out that the equally cheap and tiny room next door to Madge and Ririka’s own apartment is occupied by their rival—Aloella-chan, the B-rank witch and popular idol! But before the girls can make any hay out of the situation, Madge finds herself formally challenged to a witch’s duel, with her recent memories at stake! She can’t chicken out, and she can’t lose those precious moments with her partner…So the only way forward is to win! And all this right before the B-rank exam, too…

9781975390204.name: Higurashi When They Cry: MEGURI Manga Volume 3
9781975390204.description: Higurashi When They Cry: MEGURI Manga Volume 3 features story by Ryukishi07 and art by Tomato Akase.As their game of cat-and-mouse continues, Rika and Satoko land in a June 1983 fragment once more. While Satoko runs amok sowing the seeds of discord between the Sonozaki twins, Rika must piece together the rules of the new game…or be forever trapped by the tragedy!

9781646093014.series: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses
9781646093014.name: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses Manga Volume 11
9781646093014.description: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses manga volume 11 features story and art by Koume Fujichika.Komura and Mie make their relationship official! They let Mie's friends know with an impromptu announcement at her birthday party. Although the pair will attend separate schools in high school, they realize they can still walk to the station together. When the sun rises on a new year, how will Mie's parents react to the couple's status?!

9781975379803.series: Riviere and the Land of Prayer
9781975379803.name: Riviere and the Land of Prayer Novel Volume 2
9781975379803.description: Riviere and the Land of Prayer Novel Volume 2 was written by Jougi Shiraishi with illustrations by Azure.Riviere and MacMilia—the veritable comedy duo—and the ashen witch Elaina take on another mysterious case! This time I, MacMilia, and Riviere have some serious challenges on our hands: tracking down a serial killer, helping a man with insomnia, sneaking into a secret party, hunting down priceless sancta, dispensing relationship advice, fighting an android, and more!

9781685796426.series: A Tale of the Secret Saint
9781685796426.name: A Tale of the Secret Saint Novel Volume 6
9781685796426.description: A Tale of the Secret Saint Novel Volume 6 was written by Touya with illustrations by Chibi.Reunited with Zavilia, Fia and her companions enjoy a peaceful and relaxing time on Blackpeak Mountain, getting to know the dragons and picking herbs. But their fun is cut short when they encounter a young woman with black hair and eyes—traits of a demon! As they face a dangerous foe unseen by mankind in over three hundred years, Fia finds herself questioning everything they thought they knew about demons. And if what they know about demons is wrong, how many more of them could be out there walking among them?

9781975378066.name: Bocchi the Rock! Manga Volume 4
9781975378066.description: Bocchi the Rock! Manga Volume 4 features story and art by Aki Hamazi.Kessoku band’s successfully cleared the first stage of the Unidentified Riot music festival! But with more trials yet to come, can Bocchi hold it together and give her all in front of SIDEROS and the other powerhouse bands…?!

9781975394356.name: Maiden of the Needle Manga Volume 4
9781975394356.description: Maiden of the Needle Manga Volume 4 features story by Zeroki and art by Yuni Yukimura.The Realm Weaveguardian, the fairy that protects the Lomestometlo Kingdom with a solid barrier, has been cursed by the former queen and is unable to display its full strength. Yui learns that she must not only enhance her blessweaving abilities, but also find a weapon imbued with the power of wind to dispel the curse and heal the Weaveguardian. Yui and her companions enter the Labyrinth in search of the right weapon, and as they ponder how they should travel the maze, they discover a gate that can transport them to another location in an instant!

9781974747047.name: Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc. Manga Volume 3
9781974747047.description: Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc. manga volume 3 features story by Sekka Iwata and art by Yu Aoki.Kana is shadowing Lily, a magical girl who works for a luxury cosmetics company, in order to learn the full breadth of her new occupation. Seeing how other companies handle Kaii outbreaks has been an excellent educational opportunity, but an intruiging assignment quickly becomes a real struggle when a tricky mission brings an agent from the largest magical girl company to the scene. Can Kana handle the combined challenge of mutating kaii and a magical girl with wildly different methods?

9781975370091.series: I Kept Pressing the 100-Million-Year Button and Came Out on Top
9781975370091.name: I Kept Pressing the 100-Million-Year Button and Came Out on Top Novel Volume 8
9781975370091.description: I Kept Pressing the 100-Million-Year Button and Came Out on Top Novel Volume 8 is written by Syuichi Tsukishima and illustrated by Mokyu.After Allen and the others rescue Shii from a political marriage with a Ronelian noble, they somehow make it through the ups and downs of the entrance exam and Valentine's day, finally completing their first year at the academy! For the upcoming spring break, they'll attend a training camp in Rose's homeland, Cherrin, the Land of Sakura! What awaits them there?!

9798888438459.name: Black Night Parade Manga Volume 4
9798888438459.description: Black Night Parade Manga Volume 4 features story and art by Hikaru Nakamura.The Reindeer exam is over and winter is approaching at Santa Claus House. Hino Miharu, a promising candidate to become the next Red Santa, returns to his home in Japan for a break, but his vacation is cut short when he receives a surprise gift from the company president, Knecht. Extraordinary powers have been bestowed on the newly appointed team of Reindeer, which includes Benjamin, a world-famous pro-wrestling powerhouse with whom Miharu forms a new, electrifying bond. With mystery, laughs, and superpowers, the fourth volume takes this O-holy-night-fantasy comedy to its next level!

9798891601178.series: I'm the Evil Lord of an Intergalactic Empire!
9798891601178.name: I'm the Evil Lord of an Intergalactic Empire! Novel Volume 7
9798891601178.description: I'm the Evil Lord of an Intergalactic Empire! Novel Volume 7 was written by Yomu Mishima with illustrations by Nadare Takamine.After repelling the United Kingdom’s invasion, Liam’s faction is now more powerful than the First Prince’s. Before he can settle things with Calvin, though, a magic circle pops up out of nowhere right at Liam’s feet. He and Japanese high school girl Kanami have both been caught up in an undeveloped planet’s hero summoning and are tasked with nothing less than defeating the Demon Lord! But…Liam’s supposed to be evil, so why is he fighting some Demon Lord as a hero?!

9798888438466.name: Backstabbed in a Backwater Dungeon Manga Volume 6
9798888438466.description: Backstabbed in a Backwater Dungeon: My Trusted Companions Tried to Kill Me, But Thanks to the Gift of an Unlimited Gacha I Got LVL 9999 Friends and Am Out For Revenge on my Former Party Members and the World Manga Volume 6 features story by Shisui Meikyou and art by Takafumi Oomae.The elite White Knights of the Elven Queendom, along with Light's former comrade Sasha, infiltrate the Great Tower. Unfortunately for them, Light's welcoming committee of Iceheat, Mera, Jack, and Suzu overwhelm most of the White Knights one by one with their incredible Level 9999 powers! Nazuna goes up against White Knight Commander Hardy, while Light's revenge plot against Sasha finally comes to a head. Will the haughty elf be flicked off the chessboard by the master strategist?!
